title: callichilia barteri
intro: Callichilia barteri, a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, is a tree native to West Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Callichilia barteri include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while its leaves and bark have been used to treat various ailments. Herbal preparations of Callichilia barteri typically involve boiling or infusing the bark, leaves, or roots in water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
